apps.name: Nova - Messenger
apps.description: A lightweight, fast, and beautifully simple messaging app designed for users who want modern features without the clutter. It delivers all the essentials — real‑time chat, media sharing, reactions, and smooth syncing — while staying incredibly efficient on storage and battery. The interface is clean, intuitive, and thoughtfully crafted to feel instantly familiar, making every conversation effortless. And with tons of customization options, you can personalize themes, layouts, colors, and chat styles to create a messaging experience that looks and feels exactly the way you want. Simple, stylish, and fully yours.

apps.name: Big Goofy Project Plus
apps.description: The first game ever published by RomanGuy, this has some old memes but fun gameplay.
